title: My Mental Choices Are Completely Interfering With My School Romantic Comedy
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 10 episodes total. Original source is a 12-volume light novel (AniList id 84431, chapters untracked); this mapping instead uses the closely-following manga adaptation by Sayaka Itsuki (5 volumes, complete at 23 chapters), which is the entry AniList tracks by chapter count. Episodic girl-of-the-week comedy format with no distinct named story arcs, so a single broad mapping is used; chapter boundaries are approximate.
